5173.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
5173.description: Wolf Blitzer is in the command center for breaking news, politics and extraordinary reports from around the world.

5174.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
5174.description: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

5175.title: Anderson Cooper 360
5175.description: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines to tell stories from many points of view, so you can make up your own mind about the news.

5176.title: Cuomo Prime Time
5176.description: Chris Cuomo gets after it with newsmakers in Washington and around the world.

5177.title: Don Lemon Tonight
5177.description: Don Lemon brings you the biggest stories, newsmakers and spirited conversations of the day.

5178.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
5178.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

5179.title: World Sport
5179.description: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

5183.title: Early Start
5183.description: Get a jump on the day's news with Christine Romans and Laura Jarrett.

5184.title: New Day
5184.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

5185.title: World Sport
5185.description: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

5186.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
5186.description: Get a head start on what's moving the business agenda with Julia Chatterley live from the floor of the New York Stock Exchange.

5187.title: Connect the World
5187.description: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

5189.title: Connect the World
5189.description: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

5190.title: Inside Politics
5190.description: An insider's look into the key stories of the week from John King and a group of America's top political reporters.

5191.title: Inside Africa
5191.description: A surge of creative energy is flowing through Rwanda where filmmakers, visual artists, entertainers and more - are rewriting the narrative and helping to shape countries future.

5192.title: Amanpour
5192.description: Christiane Amanpour provides her powerful interview skills and provocative analysis on global stories that matter to you.

5193.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
5193.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

5194.title: Quest Means Business
5194.description: Richard Quest presides over a cast of experts and correspondents to deliver unrivaled facts, figures and analysis from the business world, a nightly wealth check.

5195.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
5195.description: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.
